accurate.why: All claims align with the bill text and accurate context (sponsor, committee referral) is verifiable.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; contextual details like sponsor and committee match the bill.

states_purpose.why: Clearly states the bill directs removal of US Armed Forces from unauthorized hostilities against Iran.

changes_to_existing_law.why: This resolution invokes existing War Powers authorities but does not amend, repeal, or add to existing law.

exceptions_conditions.why: Summary accurately captures the rule-of-construction carve-outs for self-defense, intelligence, and assisting partners.

effective_dates.why: Summary correctly notes the resolution specifies no deadline for removal of forces.

major_provisions_covered.why: Captures findings, the removal directive, invoked authorities, and rule of construction.

objective_tone.why: The summary is neutral and descriptive without editorializing.

concise.why: Free of padding and repetition while remaining complete.

correct_entities.why: Senator Merkley, the War Powers Resolution, cited statutes, and committee are all correctly identified.

correct_figures.why: The date February 28, 2026 and the fiscal years 1984/1985 are stated correctly.
